channel.title: Pagination for the TwentyTwenty theme
channel.description:
**--- [Roadmap Card](https://www.notion.so/frontity/Pagination-for-the-TwentyTwenty-theme-088c647610fe4c75bdb721cd038a4a18)** **--- [Sprint Card](https://github.com/orgs/frontity/projects/2#card-33013919)**
## Description Right now the TwentyTwenty theme has a simple pagination (old/new posts links). We want it to have the same pagination as the original theme.
## User Stories
> As a **reader of a Frontity site** > I want to **have access to different pages in the footer** > so that **I can navigate easily between pages**
## Possible solution
Add pagination similar to the one of the twenty-nineteen theme:
![Screen Shot 2020-02-12 at 18.04.26|690x85](upload://A7wmvOeUXftypczFzJZPnW3D9CW.png) - https://twentynineteen.frontity.org/page/3/ - https://github.com/imranhsayed/frontity-twentynineteen/blob/master/packages/twentynineteen-theme/src/components/list/pagination.js

item.title: Pagination for the TwentyTwenty theme
item.dc:creator: luisherranz
item.description:
— Roadmap Card
— Sprint Card

Description

Right now the TwentyTwenty theme has a simple pagination (old/new posts links). We want it to have the same pagination as the original theme.

User Stories

As a reader of a Frontity site
I want to have access to different pages in the footer
so that I can navigate easily between pages

Possible solution

Add pagination similar to the one of the twenty-nineteen theme:

  • https://twentynineteen.frontity.org/page/3/
  • https://github.com/imranhsayed/frontity-twentynineteen/blob/master/packages/twentynineteen-theme/src/components/list/pagination.js

Read full topic
